toc_content:
General Requirements on Methodology and
Templates
AUTOSAR CP Release 4.4.0
Table of Contents
1 Introduction 6
1.1 Scope of this document : 6
1.2 Document Conventions : 7
1.3 Guidelines : 8
1.4 Requirements Tracing : 9
2 Requirements 10
2.1 Category: AUTOSAR Main Requirements : 10
2.1.1 Re-usability : 10
[RS_MTG_00001] AUTOSAR shall ease the re-usability of soft-
ware and its concepts and implementations : 10
2.1.2 Different functional domains : 10
[RS_MTG_00002] AUTOSAR shall provide a software architecture
that is applicable across different functional domains 10
2.1.3 Interoperability with legacy software : 10
[RS_MTG_00003] AUTOSAR shall provide interoperability with
legacy software : 10
2.2 Category: Variant Handling : 11
2.2.1 Supported combinations of System Constant Value : 11
[RS_MTG_00005] Describe supported combinations of System
Constant Value of an Software Component Type . . 11
[RS_MTG_00006] Describe supported combinations of System
Constant Value of an InternalBehavior : 11
[RS_MTG_00007] Describe supported combinations of System
Constant Value of an Implementation : 12
[RS_MTG_00008] Describe Special Data which only applies for
specific variants : 12
3 Change History 13
3.1 Change History for AUTOSAR 4.1.1 against 4.0.3 : 13
3.1.1 Removed RS Items : 13
3.1.2 Changed RS Items : 13
3.1.3 Added RS Items : 13
3.2 Change History for AUTOSAR 4.2.1 against 4.1.1 : 14
3.2.1 Removed RS Items : 14
3.2.2 Changed RS Items : 14
3.2.3 Added RS Items : 14
4 of 14
— AUTOSAR CONFIDENTIAL —Document ID 604: AUTOSAR_RS_MethodologyAndTemplatesGeneral
